name: Red, White, & Blueberry Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the bottom layer of cake onto a serving plate.
2. Spread with blueberry pie filling.
3. Add the second layer of cake.
4. Spread with strawberry pie filling.
5. Top with the third layer of cake.
6. Frost the top and sides of the cake with whipped topping.
7. Chill until ready to serve.
